title: e2e-assure introduces Cumulo, the U.K.’s only sovereign, AI-driven, zero-day SOC platform to secure IT and OT environments
slides: Can a SOC see threats that don't exist yet?
e2e-assure built Cumulo for UK's IT and OT.
It zeroes in on attacks before any signature exists.
Your environment gets a shield no one else offers.
Demand a zero-day SOC demo from your provider.
thread_text:
1. Predicting the invisible.

Cumulo spots zero-day attacks before any vendor has written a signature.

2. From IT to OT.

e2e-assure built it for both networks—unifying threat detection across a gap most providers ignore.

3. No signature, no problem.

The AI finds anomalies that match no known pattern, so attacks get blocked on arrival.

4. A shield only you get.

Your environment becomes its own unique baseline—attackers can't mimic what they don't see.

5. Ask for a zero-day SOC demo.

Call your current provider and demand proof they can see what doesn't exist yet.
video_script: Cumulo predicts them before they appear.
Covers both IT and OT networks.
No signature needed to catch attacks.
Demand a zero-day SOC demo now.

instagram.caption:
Your IT and OT networks face attacks that don't exist yet—no signature, no known pattern.

e2e-assure built Cumulo, the U.K.’s only sovereign SOC platform, to spot zero-day threats before any vendor writes a fix. It treats your environment as a unique baseline. 🤖 Attackers can't mimic what they can't see. 🛡️

Your security provider now has no excuse. If they can't detect the invisible, you're exposed.

Call your current provider today and demand a zero-day SOC demo. Will they show you proof, or pass the blame?
